title: Serifa Altunen
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Jedi |image= |name=Serifa Altunen |homeworld=[[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]]{{CSWECite|I|25|Altunen, Serifa}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]]''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Female]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes=[[Color/Legends|White]] |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= *[[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] {{C|Formerly}} *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] {{C|Formerly}} |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|I follow the Force—not the law. I serve the people—not the Senate. I will make peace—not war.|Serifa Altunen to Obi-Wan Kenobi|}} '''Serifa Altunen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] in the waning [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. When the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] broke out between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]], Altunen decided to leave the Order, believing that it should be serving [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], not the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] and its war. ==Biography== {{Quote|I do not feel lost. The Force is as it always has been. It is the Order that has strayed from the path.|Serifa Altunen to Obi-Wan Kenobi|}} Serifa Altunen was a [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Arkanian/Legends|Arkanian]] who [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] under the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]]. Ascending to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] after completing her [[Jedi Trials/Legends|trials]], Altunen went on to become well respected within the Order. When negotiations between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] broke down and the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] erupted across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. As the war dragged on, Altunen became disenchanted with the Order's role in the war and the corruption in the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. Departing [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Altunen returned to her homeworld of [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]] where she began encouraging the Arkanian government to declare neutrality during the Clone Wars. When the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] heard of this, Jedi Master [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and Jedi Knight [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] were dispatched to persuade her to return to the Order and the war. Rendezvousing with Altunen on a watery tundra plain thirty months after the start of the war, Master Kenobi pleaded with the woman to return to the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]]. Taking off her [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi robe]] and folding it, Altunen officially resigned from the Order, citing that she served the Force, and that she believed that the Jedi no longer did. With the conversation over, Altunen departed the company of her fellow Jedi and returned to her people. ==Powers and abilities== {{Quote|Does she really have influence on the government?''"
"''I have to think a respected Jedi coming forward to say she has renounced the Order and recommending that Arkania declare itself to be a neutral party in the war would carry weight. At the very best, it's diplomatically damaging, and a public relations nightmare.|Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi, regarding Serifa Altunen|}} Altunen received training from the Jedi Order and was able to pass the trials to become a Jedi Knight. Having earned a stature of respect, her opinion carried a strong weight towards the government of her homeworld. ==Equipment== Serifa Altunen wore a [[Jedi apparel/Legends|Jedi cloak]] during her service to the Jedi Order. She gave it back to Obi-Wan Kenobi when she left the Order. ==Behind the scenes== Serifa Altunen is a character created by author [[Sean Stewart]] for the [[2004]] novel ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]''. In ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'', published in [[2008]], it is stated Altunen is a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]]. However, in ''Yoda: Dark Rendezvous'', she is labeled as a Jedi Knight only. ==Appearances== *''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'' {{Ab|Yoda: Dark Rendezvous (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}} ==Sources== *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Serifa Altunen |es=Serifa Altunen |fr=Serifa Altunen |pt=Legends:Serifa Altunen }} {{DEFAULTSORT: Altunen, Serifa}} [[Category:Arkanians]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Former Jedi]] [[Category:Jedi Generals]] [[Category:Post-Ruusan Jedi Knights]]
